message.reasoning:
Need produce JSON with 7 days, each total 1765 calories. Must include protein carbs fats totals (can be same each day). Provide items with calories sum. Must respect iron: include iron-rich foods, avoid tea/coffee with meals. Gluten-free. Provide realistic portions.

We can simplify by using same macro distribution each day: protein 130g (520 cal), carbs 200g (800 cal), fats 60g (540 cal) total 1860 – too high. Need 1765 calories. Let's pick protein 120g (480), carbs 180g (720), fats 55g (495) = 1695. Need extra 70 calories maybe from extra carbs. adjust: carbs 190g (760) total 480+760+495=1735 need 30 more maybe from protein? add 7.5g protein (30 cal). So protein 127.5g, carbs 190g, fats 55g => calories 510+760+495=1765. Good.

Provide as strings maybe rounded: protein "128g", carbs "190g", fats "55g".

Now craft meals each day 5-6 items. Ensure sum 1765.

I'll create day 1 with 5 meals each calories: 350, 400, 250, 350, 415 = 1765.

List items with calories.

Proceed similarly for days 2-7.

Will ensure gluten-free (use quinoa, rice, gluten-free oats). Iron-rich: lean beef, lentils, spinach, pumpkin seeds, tofu. Pair with Vitamin C (bell peppers, citrus). Avoid tea/coffee with iron meals.

Provide JSON.
